name: Save Delta
description: Saves the DataFrame into the specified location in Delta Format.

fields.name: path
fields.title: Path
fields.description: Path to save the delta files

fields.name: saveMode
fields.title: Save Mode
fields.description: Whether to Append, Overwrite or Error if the path Exists

fields.name: mergeSchema
fields.title: Merge Schema
fields.description: If true, then any columns that are present in the DataFrame but not in the target table are automatically added on to the end of the schema as part of a write transaction

fields.name: overwriteSchema
fields.title: Overwrite Schema
fields.description: If true, overwrites the schema of the Delta table with the schema of the incoming DataFrame

fields.name: optimizeWrite
fields.title: Optimize Write
fields.description: If true, it optimizes Spark partition sizes based on the actual data

fields.name: overwritePartitionPredicate
fields.title: Overwrite Partition Predicate
fields.description: If specified, then it selectively overwrites only the data that satisfies the given where clause expression.

fields.name: extraOptionsKeys
fields.title: Properties Name
fields.description: Extra options/properites available while executing in read delta.

fields.name: extraOptionsValues
fields.title: Properties Value
fields.description: Config Values for the Corresponding properites name
